title: PhD Scholarships
content:
PhD Scholarships

Advance Payment Discount

A 10% discount is applied for advance payments.

Institution Scholarship

Members of the Turkish Armed Forces, Police Force, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Family and Social Policies, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Family and Social Policies, University and National Education, and employees subject to 657 are given a 10% discount on tuition fees at the time of final registration in Üsküdar University's doctoral programs.

Graduate Scholarship

A 20% discount is given to students who graduate from Üsküdar University Master's Programs with Thesis and are eligible to enroll in Üsküdar University doctoral programs.

Staff Scholarship

A 50% discount is given to the staff who have been working at Üsküdar University or NP Group for at least 3 years at the time of their final enrollment in Üsküdar University doctoral programs, and a 20% discount is given to the staff who are still working but have not completed 3 years.

Scope and Termination of Scholarship

1) Students can benefit from only one of the scholarships/discounts of our university.

2) Students who are eligible for more than one scholarship/discount can only benefit from the one with the highest amount.

3) In case of termination of the employment relationship of the recipient of the staff scholarship, except for retirement, the staff scholarship is discontinued.

4) It is obligatory for the person who benefits from the staff scholarship to continue working at the University or NP Group for at least 2 years after graduation. However, the employer reserves the right to terminate the employment relationship within this period.
